remediation_items.title: Executive dashboard uses uncertified datasets
remediation_items.description: Executive dashboard is powered by uncertified datasets: Executive KPI Snapshot.
remediation_items.recommended_action: Certify upstream datasets or clearly label the dashboard as not certified for executive decision-making.
remediation_items.success_measure: Finding is resolved or accepted with documented business rationale.

remediation_items.title: Sensitive dataset lacks stewardship
remediation_items.description: Sensitive dataset has no named steward.
remediation_items.recommended_action: Assign a data steward responsible for access, definitions, and quality expectations.
remediation_items.success_measure: Sensitive datasets with assigned stewardship reaches target coverage.

remediation_items.title: Sensitive dataset lacks stewardship
remediation_items.description: Sensitive dataset has no steward or owner.
remediation_items.recommended_action: Assign both an owner and a steward before broadening access or certification.

remediation_items.title: Review and remediate stale dataset
remediation_items.description: Dataset last refreshed on 2026-04-15 is stale for its manual cadence.
remediation_items.recommended_action: Confirm whether the dataset is still required, refresh it, define an SLA, or retire dependent reporting.
remediation_items.success_measure: Stale executive or high-criticality datasets remediated or formally retired.

remediation_items.title: Critical dashboard depends on manually refreshed data

remediation_items.recommended_action: Move these datasets to scheduled refreshes with freshness alerts and documented SLAs.
